text:
Type Code (Second Occurrence) ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: Monthly values for the second of up to 10 waiver type codes. There are separate variables for each of 
the 12 months during the year. The last two digits of this variable indicate the month. 

SHORT NAME: WVR_TYPE_CD_02_01 
WVR_TYPE_CD_02_02 
WVR_TYPE_CD_02_03 
WVR_TYPE_CD_02_04 
WVR_TYPE_CD_02_05 
WVR_TYPE_CD_02_06 
 WVR_TYPE_CD_02_07 
WVR_TYPE_CD_02_08 
WVR_TYPE_CD_02_09 
WVR_TYPE_CD_02_10 
WVR_TYPE_CD_02_11
